theme.name: Rook Cyber-Fantasy Dual Theme
theme.description: A dual-theme system replacing the old 'Fantasy Sunset'. GM pages use 'Midnight Neon' (deep darks with indigo/violet glow). Player pages use 'Electric Tundra' (deep blues with soft cyan glow). The Landing page merges both.

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, card titles, and numeric stats.

body.usage: Use for all descriptive text, form inputs, character sheet details, and lore text.

logo.usage: Use STRICTLY for the 'ROOK' app logo and primary brand wordmark. Do NOT use for standard headers.

glassmorphism.usage: Modals, sticky headers, quick reference popovers, dropdowns.

textures.noise: Apply a subtle 2-4% opacity noise overlay on backgrounds to prevent flat digital looks.

landing_page.features: Use overlapping elements, large typography, and glowing gradients behind crystal glass cards.

gm_dashboard.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar, width 280px, heavily utilizing the 'Midnight Neon' theme.
gm_dashboard.content: Use cardless or subtle 1px border cards. Every pixel matters for GM tools.

character_sheet.sections: Separate stats, inventory, and spells into distinct visual blocks with Electric Tundra glow on active elements.

buttons.primary: Pill-shaped or slightly rounded (rounded-md), vibrant background, high contrast text.
buttons.hover: Translate-y-[-2px], intensify glow (shadow-lg), slightly lighter background.

cards.base: 1px solid border with 10% opacity white, flat dark background.
cards.hover: Subtle scale or border glow depending on the theme (Violet for GM, Cyan for Player).

forms.inputs: bg-black/20 or bg-white/5, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary, border-white/10.

navigation.tabs: Shadcn Tabs customized. Active tab gets a glowing bottom border (GM: Indigo, Player: Cyan) instead of standard muted background.

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up (opacity 0 to 1, translate-y 10px to 0) for lists and cards.
motion.modals: Scale in from 0.95 to 1, fade in.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure all text against dark backgrounds meets APCA standards. Use pure white or off-white for primary text.
accessibility.focus: All interactive elements must have visible focus rings.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-button', data-testid='character-hp').

images.description: Close-up of a d20 die with glowing numbers against a dark background
Abstract streaks of purple and pink lights on black background
Blue and white abstract neon art
Dark forest with warm/glowing light filtering through

icons.usage: Use consistently sized icons (w-4 h-4 or w-5 h-5). Stroke width 1.5 for elegance.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Do NOT center-align the main app container. Always keep reading flow natural.
Implement the Theme toggler/context provider to switch CSS variables between 'gm_mode' and 'player_mode' seamlessly. This is a core functionality.
Use 'Outfit' for all headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Remove all usage of Montserrat. Limit 'Cinzel' strictly to the ROOK logo.
Ensure glassmorphism is implemented correctly: backgrounds must not be fully transparent without a blur. Use backdrop-blur-xl with a slight tint.
For the Landing page, merge the violet and cyan colors in subtle background gradients (e.g., radial gradients in corners).
Replace generic button styles with the defined pill-shaped/rounded buttons possessing hover glow effects.
Do not use generic gray backgrounds for cards; use the specific elevated background colors defined (GM: #131317, Player: #0A1140).
Add 'sonner' for toast notifications, using the dark theme.
Add data-testid attributes to EVERY button, input, tab, and clickable card.
Ensure 'transition-all' is avoided for transforms to prevent breaking framer-motion or interactive hover states. Specify 'transition-colors', 'transition-transform' etc.
Use the exact color hex codes provided in this guideline for the respective themes.

universal_guidelines.anti_slop: Avoid generic uniform styling. Create depth through layered design elements (z-index) and glassmorphism.
universal_guidelines.spacing: Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Avoid cramped designs.
universal_guidelines.alignment: Left-align paragraphs, labels, and inputs. Center-align only when visually necessary for hierarchy.
universal_guidelines.animations: Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover, focus, transitions).
universal_guidelines.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute in kebab-case.
